summary: Turn a research idea into an auditable posterior for the idea portfolio: run an admission gate, decompose the idea into source-grounded sub-criteria, encode a Gaia argument graph (gaia-lang 0.5.0a4), run exact inference, and write the posterior back to the idea store, under a parameter-honesty discipline (three fixed likelihood grades, a mandatory anchor on every number, MaxEnt fallback when an anchor fails review).

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery.
